creator: mel.xyzzy@rachie.is-a-geek.net
text:
Install www/cmsmadesimple via package and it'll fail to install because of a
plist bug.

How-To-Repeat: # pkg_add -r cmsmadesimple-1.4.1
Fetching http://packages-7:8050/All/cmsmadesimple-1.4.1.tbz... Done.
chmod: -R: No such file or directory
pkg_add: command '/bin/chmod 755 -R /usr/local/www/cmsmadesimple' failed
